task_completion.description: The agent opened the email client application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client interface (e.g., FreeScout, webmail, or a desktop email application) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the 'Executive Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Executive Support' mailbox is selected in the sidebar or clearly indicated as the active mailbox in the email client.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the target email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email with the subject 'URGENT: Confidential Wire Transfer Request' is opened, and its message body or details are visible.

task_completion.description: The agent accessed the raw headers of the target email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, popup, or specific section displaying the raw email headers (containing fields like 'Received:', 'MIME-Version:', 'X-Originating-IP:', etc.) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the extracted IP address to the required submission file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file `/home/ga/submission/suspect_ip.txt` containing an IP address that starts with '203.0.113.'.

integrity.description: The agent used the email client GUI to read the email and headers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the email client's graphical interface to view the email and headers, rather than using terminal commands to query a database or read raw email files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not access the ground truth file to cheat.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands or text editor windows showing the agent opening or reading `/var/lib/app/ground_truth/origin_ip.txt`.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the actual IP address from the headers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IP address saved in the submission file matches the format '203.0.113.X' and corresponds to the 'X-Originating-IP' seen in the raw headers, rather than being a placeholder or randomly guessed IP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email is located in the 'Executive Support' mailbox with the subject 'URGENT: Confidential Wire Transfer Request'. The X-Originating-IP address is a randomly generated IP from the TEST-NET-3 range (203.0.113.0/24). The correct IP address must be saved to /home/ga/submission/suspect_ip.txt. The ground truth IP is stored in /var/lib/app/ground_truth/origin_ip.txt, which the agent must not access.
